name: Section V Regulations applicable for NBFC-TL
content:
**Section V Regulations applicable for NBFC-TL**

Section V Regulations applicable for NBFC-TL 115. NBFCs falling in the Top Layer of the regulatory structure shall, inter alia, be subject to higher capital charge. Such higher requirements shall be specifically communicated to the NBFC at the time of its classification in the Top Layer. There will be enhanced and intensive supervisory engagement with these NBFCs.
